theme_and_archetype.description: Dark mode elegante. Posicionamiento: Profesional, Profundo, Claro. Premium SaaS aesthetic for applied psychology and emotional education. Avoids typical 'therapy' or 'self-help' clichés. Focuses on cinematic depth, high contrast, and introspective space.

rules.usage: Use accents (blue, purple, pink) strictly as ambient glows (blur-3xl), subtle borders, tags, or hover states. Never use them as massive solid blocks of color. The primary CTA must be high-contrast white/off-white for a premium SaaS feel.
rules.gradients: Avoid flat full-screen gradients. Use subtle radial gradients at the top or bottom of sections to create depth.
rules.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl with a 1px border of white/10 for floating navs and sticky headers.

rules.headings: Never use Inter for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk with tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
rules.alignment: Prioritize left-alignment for dense content and text. Center-alignment only for Hero H1 or specific symmetrical breaks.
rules.contrast: Ensure body text is strictly #A0A0AB or #F3F4F6 to meet APCA contrast ratios against the #0A0A0C background.

rules.borders: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision. Max border radius is rounded-xl.
rules.dashboard: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children. Keep borders to 1px solid white/10.

hero.style: Cinematic. Use abstract dark emotion image with a bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0C] via-[#0A0A0C]/80 to-transparent overlay. Large typography, high-contrast primary CTA button.
hero.cta: Rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-white text-black font-medium hover:scale-105 transition-transform

navigation.style: Crystal Glass variant. Sticky top, z-50. bg-[#0A0A0C]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5.
navigation.layout: Flex container. Logo left, Links center (hidden on mobile), CTA right. Use Lucide-react for hamburger menu.

cards_marketing.style: Bento 'Tetris' Grid. Background #121216, border 1px solid white/5. Use subtle radial glows inside the card on hover using the accent colors (blue/purple/pink).

cards_dashboard.style: Flat background (#121216), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and border color darkens to accent-blue.

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn UI heavily customized. bg-transparent, border-white/10, text-primary. Focus state: ring-1 ring-accent-soft_pink border-accent-soft_pink.

marquee.style: Editorial Ribbon. Extremely slow scroll. uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs text-brand-text/30. Use to display philosophies or keywords (Entender. Sanar. Construir. Decidir.).

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST explicitly set text color on hover. Buttons should have a subtle scale or brightness shift.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Fade-in entrance animations for major sections (framer-motion, initial={{opacity:0, y:20}}).
interactions_and_motion.micro_interactions: Use staggered entrance for the courses grid. Subtle skeleton loading states for Dashboard data fetching.

hero_background.description: Abstract reflection of light on a dark, textured surface with an artistic feel.
hero_background.placement: Home page hero section background (requires heavy dark overlay)

focus_women.description: Woman looks up with a dark background.
focus_women.placement: Image for the 'Mujeres' focus card/section on Home page

focus_men.description: A contemplative young man stands in a shadowy indoor environment, evoking a moody and introspective atmosphere.
focus_men.placement: Image for the 'Hombres' focus card/section on Home page

focus_relationships.description: An intimate moment of a couple in dark lighting.
focus_relationships.placement: Image for the 'Relaciones' focus card/section on Home page

course_thumbnail_1.description: A cozy workspace with a glowing laptop and stacked books, perfect for night-time productivity.

course_thumbnail_2.description: laptop turned on in dark room

about_us_image.description: Hands creating an artistic light effect with rainbow colors in a dark setting.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Ensure you import 'Cabinet Grotesk' from Fontshare or similar via standard @font-face, and 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts.
ICONS: Install and use `lucide-react` for standard icons, but prefer `@phosphor-icons/react` for high-end duotone icons if possible.
COMPONENT STRATEGY: Build the marketing Home and About pages using raw Tailwind CSS (divs, sections) for maximum creative freedom, bento layouts, and asymmetry. DO NOT force Shadcn cards here.
DASHBOARD & CATALOG: Use Shadcn UI primitives for the Admin dashboard (Tables, Forms, Dialogs) and the Courses catalog filters.
ACCESSIBILITY: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='explore-courses-button').
ROUTING: Ensure standard React Router setup with routes for /, /cursos, /cursos/:id, /nosotros, /admin/login, /admin/dashboard.

STYLES: Do not use arbitrary heavy gradients. Stick to the defined dark palette (#0A0A0C bg). Use accent colors strictly for glowing effects, subtle 1px borders, and hover states. Maintain a high-contrast premium SaaS look.
